spec.summary: A spell that binds effects using sound magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that binds effects using sound magic. A circle bind/create recipe that channels sound discipline into sonic output. It applies a ring pattern against individual across touch reach with sustained persistence. The sustained window is set to 50 minutes.
